properties.name: documints
properties.description: A static-site generator for documentation, with page hierarchy driven entirely by frontmatter.
properties.help:
Usage:
  documints <subcommand>

Description:
  A static-site generator for documentation, with page hierarchy driven entirely by frontmatter.

Sub-commands:
  dev    Start the documints development server
  build  Build the documints site for production
  init   Bootstrap a new documints project in the current directory

properties.name: dev

port.description: Port to run the dev server on

host.description: Host to bind the dev server to

open.description: Open the dev server in your browser

properties.help:
Usage:
  documints dev [--options]

Description:
  Start the documints development server

Options:
  --help, -h   Display the help menu [boolean] (optional)
  --port, -p   Port to run the dev server on [number] (optional, default: 3000)
  --host       Host to bind the dev server to [string] (optional, default: localhost)
  --open, -o   Open the dev server in your browser [boolean] (optional, default: false)
  --auto-init  Automatically bootstrap .documints/ if it's missing [boolean] (optional, default: false)

properties.name: build
properties.description: Build the documints site for production
properties.help:
Usage:
  documints build [--options]

Description:
  Build the documints site for production

Options:
  --help, -h   Display the help menu [boolean] (optional)
  --auto-init  Automatically bootstrap .documints/ if it's missing [boolean] (optional, default: false)

properties.name: init
properties.description: Bootstrap a new documints project in the current directory
properties.help:
Usage:
  documints init [--options]

Description:
  Bootstrap a new documints project in the current directory

Options:
  --help, -h  Display the help menu [boolean] (optional)
